Meta.title: VoxScore — Global AI Vocal Performance League
Meta.description: Discover who sings a song best. AI-scored, community-voted vocal performances.

Nav.footerTagline: VoxScore — embeds only, never hosts media.

Common.provisionalBadgeTitle: Estimated by AI from metadata — not a real audio measurement.

Home.heroSubtitle: Add a YouTube performance, get a Provisional AI Estimate, then let verified listeners vote and battle.
Home.supabaseHint: Supabase is not configured yet. Start the local stack (pnpm db:start) and set .env.local, then add a performance.
Home.ctaChallengeBody: Pick a song and invite friends to battle.
Home.ctaRequestBody: Add your cover to the league — admins review every request.
Home.ctaInviteBody: Share VoxScore and grow the league.
Home.tryNow: Try it now — watch a battle, no account needed

Errors.title: This round hit a wrong note.
Errors.body: The page could not finish loading. Try the round again or return to the live scoreboard.
Errors.notFoundBody: The link may be old, private, or removed. Return to VoxScore to find a live performance.

Add.title: Add a performance
Add.subtitle: Paste a YouTube link. We embed it (never download), fetch its metadata, and create a Provisional AI Estimate.
Add.signInPrompt: Please <link>sign in</link> to add a performance.
Add.reviewNote: Requests are reviewed by an admin before they appear in the league.
Add.requestSuccessTitle: Your request is in the review queue
Add.requestSuccessBody: Request ID: {id}. An admin will review it soon.
Add.noRequests: You haven't submitted any requests yet.

Battle.guestWatchBoth: Watch both fully to pick a winner
Battle.guestPickCta: Pick the winner — create your free account
Battle.subtitle: Two performances, one winner. Listen to both fully, then decide.
Battle.mustListenBoth: You must fully listen to BOTH performances before choosing a winner.
Battle.notEnough: Not enough performances to battle yet. Add more!
Battle.predictPrompt: Before you listen: who takes this?
Battle.predictDisclaimer: Predictions are a game — they never affect scores. Only verified listens unlock real votes.

Standings.title: Battle standings
Standings.subtitle: Ranked by Elo from head-to-head battles.
Standings.empty: No battles yet. Open the Battle arena to start one.

League.title: Weekly League
League.noCohort: You'll be placed into a league next Monday — keep listening and voting to earn points.
League.pointsGuide: Verified listen +1 · verified battle vote +2 · battle win +5
League.loadError: The weekly league could not be loaded.

Leagues.title: Your Leagues
Leagues.subtitle: Private scoreboards for your class, choir, team, or closest friends.
Leagues.genericError: The league could not be updated.
Leagues.loadError: Your leagues could not be loaded.
Leagues.empty: You have not joined a private league yet. Create one or enter an invite code below.
Leagues.inviteBody: Accept the invite to compete with this crew on VoxScore.
Leagues.notFound: This league invite was not found.

Performance.measuredCaption: Measured criteria come from the artist's own submitted recording â the audio is analyzed, then deleted.
Performance.signInToVote: <link>Sign in</link> and complete a Verified Listen to vote.
Performance.aiScorePending: Voting opens after the performer creates the verified AI opening score from their own recording.
Performance.verifiedVotes: {count, plural, one {# verified vote} other {# verified votes}}
Performance.challengeCta: Challenge a friend to this duel

ShareKit.title: Share kit
ShareKit.caption: Rate my cover on VoxScore 🎤 {url} #VoxScoreChallenge #cover #singing
ShareKit.kitStep2: Film your reaction or a 15s highlight of yourself
ShareKit.kitStep3: Post with the caption — your card + link do the rest
ShareKit.mediaNotice: This kit only downloads the VoxScore-generated score card. It never downloads or republishes YouTube media.

Vote.hintIdle: Press play and watch for at least 1 second to unlock voting.
Vote.errStart: Could not start the listen session.
Vote.verified: Verified Listen complete — you can vote now.
Vote.notVerified: Listen not verified. Watch for at least 1 second to vote.

Admin.openFlags: {count, plural, one {# open flag} other {# open flags}}
Admin.openRequests: {count, plural, one {# open request} other {# open requests}}
Admin.calibrateIntro: Human-scored anchors that calibrate the AI scoring model. Paste a performance ID and rate each criterion.
Admin.openPerformanceRequests: {count, plural, one {# pending request} other {# pending requests}}
Admin.noEvents: No events in this window yet.
Admin.openAppeals: {count, plural, one {# open appeal} other {# open appeals}}

Dmca.intro: We embed YouTube videos and never host media. If you believe content here infringes your rights, file a request below and we will review it promptly.
Dmca.detailsPlaceholder: Describe the claim (rights, infringing content, etc.)
Dmca.filed: Your request has been filed. We will review it promptly.
Dmca.failed: Could not file the request. Check your input.

Song.subtitle: Who sings this song best — ranked by score.
Song.challengeCta: Invite a friend to battle over this song

Appeals.reasonPlaceholder: Why should this decision be reversed?
Appeals.submitted: Appeal submitted — an admin will review it.
Appeals.hiddenBanner: This performance was hidden by a moderator. You can appeal this decision.
